news.headline: Abrdn reports UK retail investors' aversion to stocks slows market growth.

S&P 500 reached 57 all-time highs in 2024, Dow hit 8 1,000-point milestones, Nasdaq surged 30%. Analysts predict 2025 growth driven by earnings, with a median S&P target of 6,600, an 11% increase. Some concerns about high valuations in the U.S. equity market.
news.summary: In 2024, the S&P 500 hit 57 all-time highs, the fifth highest in history, while the Dow achieved a record eight 1,000-point milestones. The Nasdaq Composite saw a 30% surge driven by the “Magnificent 7” stocks. Looking ahead to 2025, analysts predict a strong market year with robust earnings growth and a positive economic climate. Louis Navellier expects earnings on the S&P 500 to grow from 8.4% in Q3 to an estimated 12% in Q4, with further growth anticipated in Q1 and Q2. Yogesh Kansal sees a "trinity of market forces" enhancing the market, including 14% corporate profit growth, pro-growth policies under the new administration, and the AI boom. Analysts foresee an 11% increase in the S&P 500 with a median 2025 target of 6,600. However, Julia Khandoshko warns that sustaining previous growth rates may be challenging and suggests focusing on strong investment ideas, particularly in small and medium-cap segments. Some experts are concerned about high valuations in the U.S. equity market. Mario Georgiou highlighted these concerns, but more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Vision for 2025: Wall Street eyes crypto. Rising comfort could bring disruption to the industry.
news.summary: There is a growing acceptance of cryptocurrency on Wall Street, which could lead to significant disruption and competition in the industry.

news.headline: Angola's latest bonds surge as traders review agreement with JPMorgan; positive market response.
XAgent AI Inc. launches innovative automated bidding platform, merging three cutting-edge technologies in procurement.
news.summary: A new automated intelligent bidding platform has been launched by XAgent AI Inc. based in San Jose, California on January 3, 2025. The platform is a leader in bidding and procurement innovation, providing a unique solution that incorporates three pioneering technologies. This marks a significant advancement in the industry and aims to streamline the bidding process for companies.

news.headline: DWF Labs report shows meme coins like Dogecoin, Shiba Inu booming in market cap, up 500% to $120B in 2024. Reshaping crypto.
news.summary: High-frequency trading company DWF Labs has put out a detailed report on the impact of meme coins on the cryptocurrency market. The report, titled "Reel-ing in the Money: How Meme Coin Culture is Changing the Crypto Market," delves into how meme coins are reshaping traditional market dynamics. In 2024, the market capitalization of meme coins witnessed a staggering 500% increase, surging from $20 billion in January to over $120 billion by December. This rapid growth illustrates a shift away from traditional approaches to value creation, focusing more on community involvement and cultural significance. This information can be found in its entirety on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: UK FM market report 2024-2030 shows 3.0% CAGR growth following Covid-19 shockwave revenue return.
news.summary: A report on the Facility Management Market in the United Kingdom for the years 2024 to 2030 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The study delves into insights and revenue generated from end-user contracts in the UK facility management (FM) sector, focusing on outsourced FM services excluding in-house operations. Despite facing disruptions from the COVID-19 pandemic in 2021, the market has shown robust revenue growth, with a projected 3.0% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) expected from 2024 to 2030.

news.headline: Happy 16th Birthday Bitcoin! 10,000 BTC for 2 pizzas ($41 then, $460M now), Buterin's backstory, missing 8,000 BTC, Nakamoto's mystery, 600k-1.1m BTC holdings.
news.summary: On January 3rd, the cryptocurrency world celebrated the 16th anniversary of Satoshi Nakamoto mining the genesis block of Bitcoin. The article highlights 16 fun facts about Bitcoin, including the first purchase made with Bitcoin in 2010, where 10,000 BTC were used to buy two pizzas, now worth over $460 million. Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, had a tie to Bitcoin through Bitcoin Weekly and Bitcoin Magazine. James Howells threw out a hard drive in 2013 containing 8,000 Bitcoins now worth over $700 million. The creator of Bitcoin remains anonymous, with theories including Craig Wright and Nick Szabo, who may hold between 600,000 and 1.1 million Bitcoins. Satoshi Nakamoto released the Bitcoin white paper on October 31, 2008, forever changing the world of cryptocurrency.

Fed's Barkin: I don't see the need to be nearly as restrictive as the Fed once was.
Fed's Barkin: The labor market is more likely to break toward increased hiring than toward layoffs.

ECB's Lane: Trade fragmentation entails sizeable output losses.
Fed's Barkin: The Fed is well positioned to respond regardless of how economy develops.
Johnson Outdoors Inc. Annual Shareholders Meeting on Feb 27, 2025, to be held virtually for shareholders of record by Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin, on January 3, 2025, Johnson Outdoors Inc. (Nasdaq: JOUT), a prominent global outdoor recreation equipment and technology innovator, announced its upcoming Annual Shareholders meeting scheduled for Thursday, February 27, 2025, starting at 8:00 a.m. CST. This event will be conducted entirely online as a "virtual meeting." Shareholders who held shares as of December 19, 2024, are eligible to participate, vote, and pose questions during the live webcast by accessing www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/JOUT2025 and inputting their 16-digit control number found on their Notice of Annual Meeting or Proxy Card or in the proxy materials instructions.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: The baseline outlook for 2025 is positive, with more upside than downside risk to growth.
Fed's Barkin: As long as employment and asset values remain strong, consumers will spend.
Fed's Barkin: There are some potential upside risks to inflation.
Fed's Barkin: Inflation is still not back to target, more work to do.
Fed's Barkin: The story of 2025 will be less about monetary policy, more about economic fundamentals and perhaps geopolitics.
Toyota NA reports 2024 U.S. Sales: over 1M electrified units sold, 53% surge YoY, 43% total sales. 30 options available in 2025.
news.summary: Toyota and Lexus achieved a landmark by surpassing one million units in electrified vehicle sales at the end of the year, marking a significant 53% surge. These electrified units now constitute over 43% of the total sales volume. The brands offer a selection of 30 electrified vehicle options, the highest among any automaker. Additionally, more electrified models are set to be available in showrooms by 2025. Lexus also set a record in this area...

news.headline: Mastercam acquires American company FASTech as part of asset acquisition, becoming world's leading CAD/CAM software provider.
news.summary: In Tolland, Connecticut on January 3, 2025, Sandvik has disclosed the procurement of American company FASTech's business, integrating it into Mastercam, the prominent CAD/CAM software provider worldwide. The acquisition, executed as an asset acquisition, is finalized. FASTech, Inc. is now a part of Sandvik, marking a significant development in the industry.

news.headline: ACI Mechanical and HVAC Sales acquires Sno Valley Process Solutions to expand services, enhancing capabilities in Everett, Washington.
news.summary: In a recent development on January 3, 2025, ACI Mechanical and HVAC Sales disclosed the successful acquisition of Sno Valley Process Solutions, a well-regarded mechanical contractor located in Everett, Washington. This acquisition is intended to enhance ACI's capacity in addressing the demands of customers with intricate HVACR requirements, further solidifying their market presence.

news.headline: Foothill Gold Line from Glendora to Pomona completed on time and on budget at $1.5 billion, includes four stations.
news.summary: A construction project in Monrovia, California has concluded as planned. The Foothill Gold Line Construction Authority stated today that the four-station light rail project, with a budget of $1.5 billion, was completed on time and within the allocated funds. The success of this venture demonstrates efficient project management and adherence to financial expectations in the transportation sector.

news.headline: Study examines Automotive Data Monetization from 2024-2030, focusing on various sectors including component suppliers, dealerships, and use case categories.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Growth Opportunities in Automotive Data Monetization, 2024-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report examines the current trends and advancements in automotive data monetization, assessing different strategies and business models for monetizing data. It also predicts growth for data-driven use case categories to highlight opportunities within the industry. The study focuses on vehicles generating data that is collectible and utilizable for various purposes.

news.headline: ARUP Labs introduces new assay to detect and subtype Influenza A (H5) virus, aiding in evaluation of HPAI.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, on January 3, 2025, ARUP Laboratories introduced a latest assay for identifying and categorizing influenza A (H5) virus. This new test will assist in assessing individuals potentially exposed to the highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) A virus.

news.headline: PREPA bondholders, including GoldenTree Asset Management and Assured Guaranty, react to U.S. Court's denial of rehearing motion.
news.summary: In New York, bondholders of the Puerto Rico Electric Power Authority (PREPA), including GoldenTree Asset Management, LP, Assured Guaranty Inc., and National Public Finance Guarantee Corporation, collectively known as the PREPA Bondholders, released a statement. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit rejected further rehearing motions from the Financial Oversight and Management Board on December 31. The Board had sought an additional round of motions, making it an unprecedented move. The decision impacts the ongoing proceedings involving PREPA's bondholders and the Board.

news.headline: Expion360 Inc. closes $2.6M direct offering and private placement priced under Nasdaq rules.
news.summary: Expion360 Inc. has recently completed a public offering and private placement at market price in accordance with Nasdaq regulations. The company successfully closed a registered direct offering and private placement, raising a total of $2.6 million. This move is aimed at generating additional capital to support the company's growth and expansion strategies.

news.headline: SparkFun Electronics and 3D Printing Nerd partner to expand access to robotics platform, addressing high demand.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between SparkFun Electronics, Experiential Robotics Consortium, and renowned 3D Printing Nerd to collaborate on additive manufacturing and content creation. The announcement was made in Boulder, Colo., on Jan. 3, 2025. This partnership comes in light of the growing demand for innovative 3D printing solutions in the market.

news.headline: Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel criticize US Gov't for blocking their acquisition, citing law violation. Biden decision challenged.
news.summary: In Tokyo and Pittsburgh, Nippon Steel Corporation (TSE: 5401) and United States Steel Corporation (NYSE: X) express disappointment over President Biden’s move to halt their planned transaction. The decision to prevent Nippon Steel’s acquisition of U. S. Steel is viewed as a breach of due process and CFIUS regulations. The companies highlight that the decision seems to have been swayed for certain reasons rather than following legal protocols.

National Sleep Foundation celebrates 35th anniversary at CES in 2025, 10 years after promoting SleepTech® at the event.
news.summary: Celebrating its 35th anniversary year, the National Sleep Foundation (NSF), a leading advocate for sleep health, marks a decade since first introducing SleepTech® at CES® in Las Vegas. The event will take place from January 7 to January 10, 2025. The NSF has been pioneering advancements in sleep technology since its initial presentation at CES, solidifying its position as a global authority on the subject. Participants can look forward to insightful discussions and innovative solutions at the event.

news.headline: Landsbankinn plans to issue domestic bonds worth €500 million in 2025.
news.summary: In the latest data released today, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The report also highlighted an increase in job creation with over 300,000 new jobs added to the economy last month. Additionally, the stock market showed significant growth with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Economists are optimistic about the future prospects of the economy based on these recent developments.

news.headline: United Supermarkets partners with TCC Global for wellness campaign, offering 28-Day Challenge with savings and prizes.
news.summary: A 28-Day Challenge organized by The United Family offers customers in Lubbock, Texas and New York a month of savings and chances to win prizes as they kickstart their yearly wellness goals, in partnership with TCC Global.

news.headline: MSI to launch green energy solutions at CES 2025: 80kW Hyper DC Fast Charger, MSI EZgo Portable Charger, MSI eConnect.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on January 3, 2025, MSI, a prominent company specializing in EV charging and renewable energy solutions, will showcase its newest products at CES 2025. Among these are the cutting-edge 80kW Hyper DC Fast Charger, the portable MSI EZgo Charger, and the innovative MSI eConnect system.

news.summary: There are concerns that former President Trump could potentially target the overseas growth of China's digital yuan. In addition, Korean financial institutions are likely to continue to be excluded from the cryptocurrency market. These updates have been highlighted in the latest edition of Asia Express 2025.

news.headline: Toll Brothers breaks ground at Lynnfield luxury home community in Massachusetts with summer 2025 sales opening.
news.summary: In Lynnfield, Massachusetts, on January 3, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the top luxury home builder in the country, revealed the groundbreaking for its latest project, Willis Brook at Lynnfield. Situated at 1301 Main Street, this luxury home community had its ceremony on January 2, attended by town officials and residents. Sales for this community are slated to commence in the summer of 2025.
